claim_boundary: CV32E40P load_store_unit module-level generic Yosys profile only; no full-core PPA, formal, toggle, cold-replay, or accepted-win claim.

profile.description: Bounded module profile for the CV32E40P load_store_unit shared-term lead that factors repeated data_sign_ext_q equality predicates into helper wires.

decision: The load_store_unit shared-term factor is module-area neutral under the bounded generic Yosys profile, so it does not clear the cheap pre-spend bar. Do not run equivalence, toggle, cold replay, or headline language for this candidate.
next_step: After ATH-2685 formal/SVA filtering lands, rerun CV32E40P recon; if only source-level load_store_unit shared terms remain and they are module-area neutral, prefer new detector families or a selected-flow full-core harness before spending on CV32E40P formal/toggle.
